<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The audit picture is now clear.

Swiper is 12.5k lines and only used on dead testimonials and demo pages. Stop the global load and lazy-load or remove those demos.

scripts/archive/ holds 2394 lines of one-time migrations. Delete it.

custom.css is a 2441-line monolith. Shrink and split it rather than delete.

Dead Hugoplate sections are absent from home.html.

Single-caller notes partials total roughly 601 lines. Some lack direct callers but are pulled in indirectly, so removal needs care.

The Google map is disabled. The authors menu is commented out with placeholder content.

Unused Hugo modules include adsense and font-awesome. Accordion, modal, tab, and mermaid may only appear in draft templates; the notice component is used in the live review post.

Dual voice lint stacks exist. notes_content.py uses hand-rolled YAML intentionally to preserve formatting. okf-viz is a development tool.

randomizer-maintain.py is a 1981-line maintainer tool. The site is single-language. tailwind-bootstrap-grid is used in notes, authors, and theme sections, though some instances are dead. pixi.js powers only the notes graph. tina/ is an unfinished experiment. previewProd has a weak cross-platform rationale. duplicate build and deploy scripts exist. dead config remains: a GA placeholder and disabled features still wired. escapeHtml is duplicated in JavaScript. garden-voice-migrate scripts are leftover post-migration artifacts.

The vendored Swiper in `_vendor` cannot be easily removed because it is Hugo module vendoring. Duplicate headers and baseof files between theme and layouts carry yagni drift risk. `collect-note-issues` is 294 lines and development-only.

Net estimates:
- Swiper theme vendored: ~12,520 lines
- Archive: 2,394
- Dead sections: ~179 lines
- Google map: 179
- Authors: ~64 lines
- Single-caller partials: ~400–600 lines
- Voice lint merge: ~200–300 lines
- okf-viz: ~1,031 lines

Aggressive cuts could save roughly 17,000 lines. Dependencies like pixi.js, tailwind-bootstrap-grid, and unused Hugo modules would remain. The realistic net estimate is higher because dead modules still carry vendored weight. previewProd is lower priority since it has a valid cross-platform reason. I still need to verify call-to-action partial usage.
</details></think>

# Ponytail audit — jorap.com

Ranked biggest cut first. Findings only — nothing applied.

1. `delete` Global Swiper bundle (~12,520 lines JS+CSS) loaded on every page via `[params.plugins]`. Page-scope or lazy-load only where gallery/slider runs (`elements.md`, `hugoplate-theme-review.md`). [`themes/jorap/assets/plugins/swiper/`, `hugo.toml`, `assets/js/main.js:119-138`]
2. `delete` `scripts/archive/` completed one-shot migrations (~2,394 lines). Nothing. [`scripts/archive/`]
3. `shrink` `assets/css/custom.css` monolith (2,441 lines). Split by route/feature; drop dead rules. [`assets/css/custom.css`]
4. `delete` Dead Hugoplate home sections never wired in `home.html` — banner, features, testimonials, home-proof (~146 lines partials + orphan section markdown). Nothing. [`themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/sections/{banner,features,testimonials,home-proof}.html`, `content/english/sections/`]
5. `delete` `call-to-action` partial + content — zero layout references. Nothing. [`themes/jorap/layouts/_partials/call-to-action.html`, `content/english/sections/call-to-action.md`]
6. `yagni` ~20 notes partials with one caller (~400–600 lines). Inline into callers. [`layouts/_partials/notes/{backlinks,copy-markdown,local-graph,note-meta,toc,...}.html`]
7. `delete` Google Map plugin + config (`enable = false`). Nothing. [`themes/jorap/assets/plugins/maps/google-map.js`, `config/_default/params.toml`]
8. `delete` Placeholder authors section (menu commented; blog uses `author: "JoRap"` string). Nothing. [`content/english/authors/`, `themes/jorap/layouts/authors/`]
9. `delete` Hugo modules with no live content: **adsense**, **mermaid**, **modal**; **font-awesome** if authors go (site already uses inline SVG). Remove `[[imports]]`. [`config/_default/module.toml`]
10. `yagni` Dual voice-lint stacks (~533 lines across three scripts). One linter with `--garden` / `--site` profiles. [`scripts/notes-voice-lint.py`, `garden-voice-lint.py`, `notes-voice-sanitize.py`]
11. `stdlib` Hand-rolled YAML parser in `notes_content.py` (577 lines). `PyYAML` for parse; keep custom dumper only if format preservation still needs it. [`scripts/notes_content.py`]
12. `delete` `scripts/okf-viz/` local dev viz (~1,031 lines). Nothing unless you still open it. [`scripts/okf-viz/`]
13. `delete` `scripts/randomizer-maintain.py` (1,981 lines) once `data/randomizer.yaml` stabilizes. Hand-edit YAML. [`scripts/randomizer-maintain.py`]
14. `delete` `scripts/garden-voice-migrate.py` + `garden-voice-finish.py` (~410 lines) — post-migration. Move to `archive/`. [`scripts/garden-voice-migrate.py`, `garden-voice-finish.py`]
15. `delete` Hugoplate demo surface: `content/english/pages/elements.md` (menu already commented). Drops gallery/slider/notice/tab/accordion showcase pages. Nothing or fold into theme-review. [`content/english/pages/elements.md`]
16. `yagni` Language switcher with one language. Nothing. [`layouts/_partials/essentials/header.html`, `themes/jorap/.../language-switcher.html`]
17. `native` `tailwind-bootstrap-grid` dep. Tailwind `grid` utilities (`.row`/`.col-*` in ~6 layouts). [`package.json`, `layouts/notes/list.html`, theme section partials]
18. `native` `pixi.js` dep — sole consumer is notes graph (1,534 lines). Canvas 2D or SVG if graph stays. [`assets/js/notes-graph.js`]
19. `shrink` `escapeHtml()` copy-pasted in four JS files. One export from `search-core.js`. [`assets/js/{notes-random,randomizer,wikilink-preview,notes-review}.js`]
20. `delete` `tina/` abandoned CMS experiment (~16 KB). Nothing. [`tina/`]
21. `delete` Disabled-feature wiring still in `baseof.html` — preloader, announcement, GTM placeholder (`G-MEASUREMENT_ID`). Guard or remove dead partial calls. [`layouts/baseof.html`, `hugo.toml`, `config/_default/params.toml`]
22. `shrink` Identical `build` and `deploy` npm scripts. One script, alias the other. [`package.json`]
23. `yagni` Theme vs site duplicate headers/baseof — production uses `layouts/` overrides; theme copies are drift surface. Collapse to one source. [`layouts/_partials/essentials/header.html`, `themes/jorap/layouts/`]
24. `yagni` `previewProd.mjs` 10-line wrapper. `pnpm build && pnpm serve` (comment cites cross-platform; marginal). [`scripts/previewProd.mjs`]

**Keep** (not over-engineering): `deployBuild.mjs` + `cspHashes.mjs` (real CSP header budget), `spawnUtil.mjs`, `themeGenerator.js`, `noteFileDates.js`, `search-core.js`, `functions/api/*` (minimal CMS OAuth), core notes graph (`link-registry`, `assembled-content`, `resolve-target`).

**net: ~-17,000+ lines possible, -2 to -4 npm deps (`pixi.js`, `tailwind-bootstrap-grid`, possibly trim Hugo modules), -3 to -6 Hugo module imports.**

Say "stop ponytail-audit" or "normal mode" to revert. Want a phased PR plan from this list?
